label: Normal Was Cancelled
effect: Start here. Welcome to the decade.

label: Lockdown Begins
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Freedom if you protest the rules.
blue_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Influence if you post the rules.

label: Toilet Paper Economy
effect: Lose 1 Money or discard a Survival card.
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Money if you have The Prepper.
blue_cycle_effect: Lower Panic by 1 if you share supplies.

label: Remote Everything
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Money if your Influence is 4+.
blue_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Influence if your Sanity is 4+.

label: Inflation Goblin
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Freedom if Money is still 5+.
blue_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Influence if you lower Market by 1.

label: Supply Chain Side Quest
red_cycle_effect: Draw a Survival card if you lose Money.
blue_cycle_effect: Control rises by 1 if anyone loses Money.

label: The Podcast Era
blue_cycle_effect: Lose no Sanity if Influence is 5+.

label: Bank App Sweats
effect: Market rises by 1. Lose 1 Money if Market is already 4+.
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Money if you are The Crypto Bro.
blue_cycle_effect: Lower Market by 1 if you discard a Survival card.

label: Celebrity Apology Loop
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Influence if you have Influence 3 or less.
blue_cycle_effect: Lose 1 Influence if you have Influence 6+.

label: AI Demo Day
effect: Choose: gain 1 Influence or move forward 2 and lose 1 Money.
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Money if you choose Influence.
blue_cycle_effect: Gain +1 Influence if you choose Influence.

label: Offline Weekend
effect: Recover 2 Sanity but skip any Influence gain this turn.

label: Election Year
effect: Apply current cycle effect, then switch cycles.

label: Deepfake Debate
blue_cycle_effect: Lose 1 Influence if Sanity 3 or less.

label: Polling Error Portal
effect: Move forward 1 or backward 1. Your choice.

label: The Timeline Glitches
red_cycle_effect: Switch places with the player behind you if any.
blue_cycle_effect: Switch places with the player ahead of you if any.

label: Victory Speech Confusion
effect: Everyone gains 1 Influence and loses 1 Sanity.

label: Smart Fridge Snitches
effect: Gain 1 Influence but Control rises by 1.

label: Scandal Weather System
red_cycle_effect: Panic rises by 1 if you lose Influence.
blue_cycle_effect: Control rises by 1 if you lose Influence.

label: Community Garden Patch
effect: Draw one Survival card or lower Market by 1.

label: Market Optimism Mirage
effect: Gain 1 Money, then Market rises by 1.

label: The Wellness Pivot
effect: Recover 1 Sanity and draw one Survival card.
red_cycle_effect: Recover Freedom too if Freedom is 3 or less.
blue_cycle_effect: Gain Influence too if Influence is 3 or less.

label: Subscription Apocalypse
effect: Lose 1 Money or discard a Survival card.
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Money if you have no held cards.
blue_cycle_effect: Lower Market by 1 if you discard.

label: Public Apology Speedrun
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Influence if you pay 1 Money.
blue_cycle_effect: Lose 1 Sanity if you do not pay 1 Money.

label: Election Year Again
effect: Apply current cycle effect, then switch cycles.

label: Final Boss Inflation
red_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Freedom if Money remains above 3.
blue_cycle_effect: Gain 1 Influence if you lower Market this turn.

label: Square And Compass
blue_cycle_effect: Lower one meter by 1 after resolving.

label: Almost Made It
effect: All players check stats. If any stat is 0, enter NPC Mode before finishing.

label: You Survived The 2020s
effect: Win if every stat is at least 1. Otherwise enter NPC Mode and try again.
red_cycle_effect: Award Survivor Ending or Bunker Ending.
blue_cycle_effect: Award Survivor Ending or Awakened Ending.
